title: Golden Flaky Irish Bulgur Wheat Pilaf
description: A resinous and flaky Irish dish featuring bulgur wheat, this plant-based friendly pilaf is perfect for a special occasion, showcasing the best of Irish cuisine with a twist of exotic flavors.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large saucepan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add the bulgur wheat and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly, until it is lightly toasted.
Add the vegetable broth, salt, and black pepper, and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the saucepan, and simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the liquid is absorbed and the bulgur wheat is tender.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and stir in the chopped parsley and lemon juice.
Transfer the pilaf to a serving dish and serve hot.
